name: caliper-test
description: Gridfinity 2x1 12u bin with contoured pocket for HARTE 6-inch digital caliper, upright storage

testPrintCandidates.reason: Caliper dimensions measured from grid photos with ±2mm uncertainty. The 2mm clearance per side may be too loose (caliper rocks) or too tight (won't insert) depending on actual measured size. A test block matching the cavity cross-section (72x20mm) lets the user check fit before printing the full 88mm tall bin.

Beam slot is 20x9mm with 2mm clearance per side on a 16x5mm nominal beam. Measurement uncertainty means the slot could be tight. Test with a short test block including both the display cavity and beam slot cross-sections to verify the transition geometry and beam centering.

45 degree chamfer on pocket opening sits at the FDM printability limit. Verify the chamfer prints cleanly without drooping and provides adequate finger clearance before committing to the full-height bin.

Display body pocket is 65mm deep. If actual display body length exceeds 63mm by more than 2mm (within ±2mm measurement error), the display body will bottom out below the ledge and not rest correctly. A test piece with the ledge geometry verifies the ledge height before full print.
